content:
- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md and applied selection rules in order.
- Verified all bug tasks are already passing; found unresolved tasks with <passes>false</passes>: task 16 (low), task 20, task 21 (blocked by 20).
- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/20-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-2.md as highest-priority unblocked failing task and wrote it to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Started by reading previous progress log and loaded current task pointer from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Opened task 20 (pass-2 meta deep skeptical review) and confirmed it had no lifecycle marker yet.
- Ran broad parallel research scan across task docs and core runtime/test surfaces (Makefile, lib lint policy, binaries policy, etcd store, ha e2e, ports, bdd tests) to build an independent plan.
- Wrote a detailed execution plan into .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/20-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-2.md including preflight model gate, 15+ parallel audit tracks, fanout rules, mandatory gates, and closeout protocol.
- Appended TO BE VERIFIED marker at the end as required by user workflow.
- Next step (next turn): read TO BE VERIFIED plan, run deep skeptical verification (16+ parallel tracks), alter at least one concrete plan item, then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Continued task 20 pass-2 workflow. Read current task pointer and task file, detected `TO BE VERIFIED`.
- Ran deep skeptical verification with 18 parallel tracks across task docs, Makefile/lint policy, config parser/schema, DCS/HA/process/pginfo workers, ports harness, and BDD tests.
- Updated task 20 plan to Draft 2 with concrete changes: made `make test-real` mandatory and required `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1` for all gate runs; added skeptical verification delta notes; switched marker to `NOW EXECUTE`.
- Began execution phase and enforced preflight model gate: `.ralph/model.txt` was `normal_high`, set to `deep_review`.
- Logged pass-2 preflight-only halt entry into meta-task 18 exploration as required.
- Must stop now per meta-task contract (set+quit when preflight mismatched). Next run should resume task 20 `NOW EXECUTE` with model already `deep_review`, then perform fresh audit, fanout tasks/bugs as needed, run mandatory gates (`make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`, `make test-real` with `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1`), then close out.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt -> .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/20-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-2.md
- Read task file; it is already at marker NOW EXECUTE with an execution plan requiring deep_review model preflight, evidence logs, audit, and mandatory gates.
- Checked .ralph/model.txt == deep_review (preflight satisfied); proceeding to execution.

- Bootstrapped evidence dir .ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass2-20260303T021732Z and captured baseline.txt
- Added meta-task 18 exploration entry for pass-2 full review (in progress)
- Ran parallel audit rg tracks (unwrap/expect/panic/todo, deny_unknown_fields, real-binary enforcement, etcd watch cancel/compaction, port reservations, clippy denies, unsafe) and captured excerpts of Makefile and key modules into evidence dir
- No immediate code smell findings from grep phase (unwrap/expect/panic/todo/unimplemented absent in src/ + tests/)

- Ran required gates sequentially with logs under .ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass2-20260303T021732Z: make check/test/test-bdd/lint and make test-real; all passed
- Updated meta-task 18 exploration with pass-2 full review summary + gate log filenames
- Reset .ralph/model.txt back to normal_high per meta-task contract
